scripts.build: bun run gen-version && bun run build:server && bun run build:client
scripts.build:server: bun run build:web && bun run build:broker && bun run build:cli
scripts.build:client: bun run build:claude-agent-host && bun run build:opencode-agent-host && bun run build:acp-agent-host && bun run build:daemon-agent-host && bun run build:sentinel
scripts.build:web: bun run gen-version && cd web && bun run build
scripts.build:web:debug: bun run gen-version && cd web && bun run build:debug
scripts.build:claude-agent-host: bun run gen-version && bun build src/claude-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile bin/rclaude
scripts.build:opencode-agent-host: bun run gen-version && bun build src/opencode-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile bin/opencode-host
scripts.build:opencode-agent-host:linux-x64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/opencode-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile bin/opencode-host-linux-x64
scripts.build:opencode-agent-host:linux-arm64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/opencode-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile bin/opencode-host-linux-arm64
scripts.build:acp-agent-host: bun run gen-version && bun build src/acp-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile bin/acp-host
scripts.build:acp-agent-host:linux-x64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/acp-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile bin/acp-host-linux-x64
scripts.build:acp-agent-host:linux-arm64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/acp-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile bin/acp-host-linux-arm64
scripts.build:daemon-agent-host: bun run gen-version && bun build src/daemon-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile bin/daemon-host && bun run codesign bin/daemon-host
scripts.build:daemon-agent-host:linux-x64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/daemon-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile bin/daemon-host-linux-x64
scripts.build:daemon-agent-host:linux-arm64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/daemon-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile bin/daemon-host-linux-arm64
scripts.build:claude-agent-host:linux-x64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/claude-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile bin/rclaude-linux-x64
scripts.build:sentinel:linux-x64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/sentinel/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile bin/sentinel-linux-x64
scripts.build:claude-agent-host:linux-arm64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/claude-agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile bin/rclaude-linux-arm64
scripts.build:sentinel:linux-arm64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/sentinel/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile bin/sentinel-linux-arm64
scripts.build:linux: bun run build:claude-agent-host:linux-x64 && bun run build:opencode-agent-host:linux-x64 && bun run build:daemon-agent-host:linux-x64 && bun run build:sentinel:linux-x64 && bun run build:claude-agent-host:linux-arm64 && bun run build:opencode-agent-host:linux-arm64 && bun run build:daemon-agent-host:linux-arm64 && bun run build:sentinel:linux-arm64
scripts.deploy: bun run build:web && bun run build:broker:docker && docker compose up -d
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && cd web && bun run typecheck
scripts.lint: fallow audit --dead-code-baseline .fallow/dead-code-baseline.json --health-baseline .fallow/health-baseline.json --dupes-baseline .fallow/dupes-baseline.json && bunx biome check --fix . && bun run lint:boundary && bun run lint:inline-import-type
scripts.install-cli: bun install && cd web && bun install && cd .. && bun run build && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/rclaude" ~/.local/bin/rclaude && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/broker" ~/.local/bin/broker && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/broker-cli" ~/.local/bin/broker-cli && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/sentinel" ~/.local/bin/sentinel && ln -sf "$(pwd)/scripts/revive-session.sh" ~/.local/bin/revive-session.sh && echo 'Symlinked rclaude, broker, broker-cli, sentinel, and revive-session.sh to ~/.local/bin'
